title: EDHOC: No validation of zcbor decoder state after parsing
description:
CORRECTNESS: After CBOR parsing, decoder state is not checked for completeness or errors.

Locations:
- Lines 491-526 (parsing message_2)
- Lines 835-887 (parsing message_1)
- Lines 1075-1091 (parsing plaintext_3)

After parsing expected fields, the code doesn't check:
1. zcbor_payload_at_end() - whether all input was consumed
2. zsd->constant_state->error - for accumulated errors

This means:
- Extra trailing data is silently ignored
- Parser errors in multi-element sequences may be missed

Per defense-in-depth, messages with unexpected trailing data should be rejected.

Fix: After parsing, validate:
if (!zcbor_payload_at_end(zsd)) {
    LOG_WRN('Trailing data in message');
    return -EINVAL;  // or just warn
}

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:491-526,835-887,1075-1091
